prompt: A photorealistic modern video game cutscene of a young Latina woman and a Caucasian man conversing on a tropical city balcony overlooking palm trees and a hotel pool. The woman faces the camera, wearing a messy high ponytail, hoop earrings, and a white one-shoulder crop top, looking serious. The man is seen from an over-the-shoulder profile on the right, wearing a dark floral shirt. The background features a pink neon 'VICE HOTEL' sign. At the bottom center, video game subtitles show the speaker name LUCIA in pink, above the white dialogue You're not listening. I'm done putting my life on hold.. Below is a player choice with a white circle and pink underlined text reading I know. I'm just saying, maybe it ain't gonna be so bad..
